forbidden.name: no-circular
forbidden.comment: Circular dependencies are forbidden — extract shared code to @los/infra or a new shared package. Note: dependency-cruiser resolves @los/* workspace imports via node_modules (doNotFollow), so cross-package cycles through @los/* subpath exports may not be detected; intra-package relative-import cycles are caught.

_comment: The former 'no-cross-package-direct-import' rule was removed: dependency-cruiser could not resolve @los/* workspace imports (couldNotResolve), so the rule was a no-op, and a blanket cross-package ban would wrongly flag legitimate layered deps (gateway->agent, executor->agent, etc.). The real 'cross-cutting concerns through @los/infra' invariant is enforced by tools/check-structure.sh (Direct third-party imports: non-infra packages may not import pg/zod/winston/pino/better-sqlite3 directly) and the 'infra is a leaf' grep in tools/check-coupling.sh. A proper dependency-cruiser layering rule would require @los/* path resolution via a root tsconfig paths map — tracked as a follow-up.
